post.description:
Create a new mission.

Writes mission JSON to logs/missions/ so it appears immediately in the UI.
Spawns MissionController in a background thread for execution.

get.description:
Return the per-mission token usage report (D-102).

Resolves dashboard placeholder IDs to controller mission IDs
so the correct token-report.json file is found.

SSE event stream endpoint.

- Sends ``connected`` event on first connect
- Replays missed events if ``Last-Event-ID`` header present
- Streams events until client disconnects
- Returns 503 if max clients reached

post.description:
Approve a pending approval.

Signal flow: validate → check duplicate → write artifact → SSE → respond.

Reject a pending approval (D-090: destructive — requires confirmation).

Signal flow: validate → check duplicate → write artifact → SSE → respond.

Cancel a running/active mission (D-090: destructive — requires confirmation).

Valid states: pending, planning, executing, gate_check, rework, approval_wait.
Completed/failed/aborted/timed_out → 409.

Retry a failed/aborted mission (OD-10: creates new mission via controller).

Valid states: failed, aborted, timed_out.
Running/pending/completed → 409.

Pause a running mission — pauses after current stage completes.

Valid states: pending, planning, executing, gate_check, rework, approval_wait.
Already paused / completed / failed → 409.

Resume a paused mission.

Valid states: paused.
Running / completed / failed → 409.

Skip the current stage in a running mission.

Valid states: pending, planning, executing, gate_check, rework, approval_wait.
Paused / completed / failed → 409.

delete.description: Delete a pending signal artifact by requestId.

get.description: Return recent errors and mutation audit entries.
Return all 9 canonical agent roles with skills, tools, and prompt previews.
List missions with filters and pagination.

SSE endpoint for live mission updates.

Streams real-time events from SSE manager.
Get OTel trace span tree for a mission.

Query structured logs with filters and pagination.

Reads from the structured log JSONL file.

DataQuality.title: DataQuality
DataQuality.description:
Response-level data quality indicator (D-068).

GPT Fix 2: known_zero removed. fresh/partial added.
Priority when multiple conditions: degraded > stale > partial > fresh.

MutationResponse.title: MutationResponse
MutationResponse.description:
D-096 mutation response contract.

API always returns lifecycleState=requested.
Subsequent states (accepted/applied/rejected/timed_out) via SSE only.

ResponseMeta.title: ResponseMeta
ResponseMeta.description: Response envelope metadata — present in every API response.

SignalArtifact.title: SignalArtifact
SignalArtifact.description: Pending signal artifact (mutation request waiting for controller).
